title: poa glabrescens
intro: Poa glabrescens, also known as Smooth Meadow-grass or Smooth Stalked Meadow-grass, is a species of grass native to Europe and parts of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Poa glabrescens include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and aid in wound healing. Poa glabrescens can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed as teas or applied topically to affected areas.
